name: Company Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Melt butter and combine with the next five ingredients: mashed sweet potatoes, sugar, milk, eggs, and vanilla.
3. Mix well and spoon into a lightly greased 2-quart baking dish.
4. Melt butter and combine with all other ingredients: coconut, brown sugar, flour, and pecans.
5. Mix well and sprinkle over the top of the mashed sweet potato mixture.
6. Bake for 45 minutes, until golden brown.
